form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fifth of 7 at Gold Coast Poly Mdn-Sw October 8 over 1100m, 9 len behind Minto's Prince with 56.5kg at $3.60. On debut third of 12 at Beaudesert Mdn September 18 over 1100m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Innervisions with 58kg at $8.50. Might be better off following this run.

form.formComment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, 9th of 11 at Toowoomba 3yo Mdn-Sw on February 28 over 1200m, 12 len behind Brave Horatius with 56kg at $51. Doubt she will trouble these.

form.formComment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, 7th of 10 at Toowoomba Mdn on February 14 over 1200m, slow going 18 len behind Ruthven Rush with 57kg at $101. Trialled on March 24 at Warwick over 800m and finished fifth. Will need to improve sharply.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start sat on the speed throughout before fading 9th of 12 at Gold Coast Mdn-Sw on November 15 over 1200m, slow going 9 len behind Chicago King with 55kg at $31. Returned from break eased back early on 6th of 9 at Gold Coast Mdn on March 21 over 1200m, 7 len behind On The Throne carrying 56.5kg at $26. Rates highly and can do much better this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Reared as the start was effected and lost ground.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months got back early 4th in a small field at Eagle Farm Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1000m, slow going 5.5 len behind Rewrite carrying 56.5kg at $23. Previously second-up 9th of 11 at Doomben 3yo Mdn-Sw on July 16 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Avior with 56kg at $41. Expected to do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up approaching the home turn.
Near the 200m, shifted in slightly before bumping with Busker.

form.formComment: Since last run she has trialed at Sunshine Coast Inner Track over 850m on 31/3/2026; Last outing ran last of 7 at Toowoomba Mdn on February 21 over 1050m, 16 len behind Copper Star carrying 56kg at $2.35. form.formComment: At the latest run 4th of 10 at Toowoomba 3yo Mdn on March 14 over 1200m, 5 len behind Mister Mighty with 55.5kg at $9. The start before that came from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Toowoomba Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1100m, 2 len behind Magic Moz with 55.5kg at $4.40. Better than that and is a leading player.

Approaching the winning post, shifted in and tighten Akku.

form.formComment: At the latest run second last in a small field at Flinton 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1200m, 8 len behind Bodyswerve with 56.5kg at $3. The race before that 4th of 8 at Moree Mdn-Sw on March 17 over 950m, 3.5 len behind Artie Vainqueur carrying 56.5kg at $14. Has been racing well. Finds a suitable race and can sneak into the money.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Near the 500m shifted out to improve.
